name: ng-menubar
title: Menubar (Angular)
description: Horizontal multi-menu bar - desktop-style File/Edit/View menus with keyboard navigation, sub-menus, checkbox and radio items. Mirrors React Menubar from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

files.content:
export {
  Menubar,
  MenubarMenu,
  MenubarTrigger,
  MenubarContent,
  MenubarGroup,
  MenubarRadioGroup,
  MenubarItem,
  MenubarCheckboxItem,
  MenubarRadioItem,
  MenubarLabel,
  MenubarSeparator,
  MenubarShortcut,
  MenubarSub,
  MenubarSubTrigger,
  MenubarSubContent,
  MenubarService,
} from './menubar';

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-menubar.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
